boundary.title: Phase 1 surface boundary and applicability baseline

features.title: Admin UIX boundary
features.description: Boundary feature: define and govern the administrator UIX surface. Current implementation status: partial. Governed by SPEC-1074.

features.title: Public UIX boundary
features.description: Boundary feature: define and govern the public end-user UIX surface. Current implementation status: partial. Governed by SPEC-1075.

features.title: Surface applicability and scope classification
features.description: Governed feature for authoritative applicability and scope classification across admin API, public API, admin UIX, public UIX, runtime, operator, and release-facing surfaces. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1078.

features.title: Admin API boundary
features.description: Boundary feature: define and govern the authenticated administrator control-plane API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1076.

features.title: Admin API contract publication boundary
features.description: Admin API boundary and contract feature: define and govern admin contract publication boundaries for the authenticated administrator control-plane API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1076.

features.title: Admin API authorization gate
features.description: Admin API boundary and contract feature: define and govern administrator authorization gate behavior for the authenticated control-plane API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1076.

features.title: Admin API resource management boundary
features.description: Admin API boundary and contract feature: define and govern administrative resource management boundaries for the authenticated control-plane API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1076.

features.title: Admin API policy control-plane boundary
features.description: Admin API boundary and contract feature: define and govern administrative policy control-plane boundaries for the authenticated control-plane API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1076.

features.title: Admin API public surface exclusion
features.description: Admin API boundary and contract feature: define and govern exclusion of public API concerns from the administrator control-plane API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1076.

features.title: Public API boundary
features.description: Boundary feature: define and govern the public OAuth, OIDC, and discovery API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1077.

features.title: Public API OAuth boundary
features.description: Public API boundary and contract feature: define and govern OAuth route boundaries for the public API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1077.

features.title: Public API OIDC boundary
features.description: Public API boundary and contract feature: define and govern OIDC route boundaries for the public API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1077.

features.title: Public API discovery boundary
features.description: Public API boundary and contract feature: define and govern discovery and metadata route boundaries for the public API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1077.

features.title: Public API registration boundary
features.description: Public API boundary and contract feature: define and govern public registration route boundaries for the public API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1077.

features.title: Public API logout boundary
features.description: Public API boundary and contract feature: define and govern public logout route boundaries for the public API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1077.

features.title: Public API admin surface exclusion
features.description: Public API boundary and contract feature: define and govern exclusion of admin control-plane concerns from the public API surface. Current implementation status: absent. Governed by SPEC-1077.
